name: Obsbot Tiny Smart Remote Controller 2 for Tiny 2
description: Control your PTZ camera and simultaneously click through your presentation with this Smart Remote Controller with USB-A Dongle from OBSBOT.

features.Key Features:: Doubles as Remote Control/Laser Clicker | Controls up to Four Devices | Intuitional Button Design | Human Tracking & Auto Zoom Activation
features.What’s in the box?: OBSBOT Smart Remote Controller with USB-A Dongle for Tiny 2 | USB-A Dongle
